The Neighbourhood.bio: The Neighbourhood (sometimes rendered as 'THE NBHD') is an American rock band formed in Newbury Park, California, in 2011.

TV Girl.bio: TV Girl is an American indie pop band from San Diego, California. Their sound has been described as 'hypnotic pop'.

Tanveer Evan.bio: Tanveer Evan is a talented artist known for his deeply emotional and resonant tracks, blending heartfelt lyrics with beautiful melodies.

Lana Del Rey.bio: Lana Del Rey is an American singer-songwriter known for her cinematic music style and exploration of tragic romance, glamour, and melancholia.

Childish Gambino.bio: Donald Glover, performing as Childish Gambino, is an American multi-hyphenate artist whose musical style spans hip hop, R&B, funk, and soul.

Kanye West.bio: Kanye West, officially known as Ye, is an American rapper, singer, and producer widely regarded as one of the most influential hip-hop artists of his generation.

Tyler, The Creator.bio: Tyler, The Creator is an American rapper, record producer, and director known for his innovative, boundary-pushing style and creative world-building.

Radiohead.bio: Radiohead are an English rock band formed in 1985. They are widely regarded as one of the most innovative and acclaimed rock bands of all time.

Ed Sheeran.bio: Ed Sheeran is an English singer-songwriter known for his acoustic-driven pop hits, memorable melodies, and deeply personal lyricism.

Eminem.bio: Eminem is an American rapper and record producer, widely considered one of the greatest, most technical, and most influential rappers of all time.

Mac DeMarco.bio: Mac DeMarco is a Canadian singer-songwriter and multi-instrumentalist.

Malcolm Todd.bio: Malcolm Todd is a talented artist.
